category_sources: Official minidjvu homepage describes a command-line utility that encodes and decodes black-and-white DjVu files and compresses multiple pages.
SourceForge project page categorizes it under Algorithms, File Compression, and Scanner.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and source_facts.name both use minidjvu.
docs_sources: Official minidjvu homepage is the best official documentation surface and includes about, supported formats, downloads, and release details.
repo_sources: Official SourceForge project exposes a Code tab for minidjvu; no separate modern Git repository was identified from official sources.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes DjVu encoding/decoding, multipage compression, PBM/BMP/TIFF support, and command-line use.
SourceForge project metadata lists file compression and scanner categories.
